name: Ichinose Uruha
description: Ichinose Uruha (一ノ瀬うるは) is a female Japanese Virtual YouTuber. She is a member of Lupinus Virtual Games (LVG), an eSport team under Virtual eSports Project. She debuted after the twin sister Kaga Nazuna & Kaga Sumire and followed with Kogara Toto.
creator: Shiro_Takashi
